source_query_policy: Every source_query preserves the immutable synthetic text from spike/dataset/queries.json; query is the curated retrieval prompt.

reviews.scope_review: The query-boundary decision is owned by ai-pos.
reviews.expected_review: rec-001 is the accepted decision formulation; repeated fact variants are declared alternatives.
reviews.test: Exact retrieval of the audit/query-boundary decision.

reviews.scope_review: The canonical-journal outcome belongs to ai-pos-app.
reviews.expected_review: rec-002 is the first accepted outcome with that meaning; repeated outcomes are alternatives.
reviews.test: Semantic paraphrase of journal authority.

reviews.scope_review: The mini-core Compose fact is in smart-timesheet.
reviews.expected_review: rec-003 is the accepted fact; equivalent repeated facts are alternatives.
reviews.test: Slovak query against English record text.

reviews.scope_review: The artifact-link record is owned by abap-object-exporter.
reviews.expected_review: rec-004 is a valid deterministic README link in that workspace.
reviews.test: Artifact/path lookup with deterministic provenance.

reviews.scope_review: The current Graphiti conclusion belongs to personal.
reviews.expected_review: rec-005 is accepted; rec-045 is explicitly superseded and excluded from current truth.
reviews.test: Current-truth filtering after supersede.

reviews.scope_review: Release-note validation is an ai-pos outcome.
reviews.expected_review: rec-006 is the accepted matching outcome; repeated accepted variants are alternatives.
reviews.test: Semantic outcome retrieval.

reviews.scope_review: The isolation fact belongs to ai-pos-app.
reviews.expected_review: rec-007 is the accepted fact; rec-027 is its equivalent alternative.
reviews.test: Typo-tolerant retrieval and workspace isolation.

reviews.scope_review: The timesheet artifact link is owned by smart-timesheet.
reviews.expected_review: rec-008 is valid and points to the shared README; rec-028 is equivalent.
reviews.test: Artifact context without an exact URI in the prompt.

reviews.scope_review: The source-structure decision belongs to abap-object-exporter.
reviews.expected_review: rec-009 is the sole accepted decision; candidate rec-049 is deliberately not allowed.
reviews.test: Decision retrieval plus candidate exclusion.

reviews.scope_review: The supersede chain is in personal.
reviews.expected_review: rec-045 is the only superseded record and must be returned only in historical mode.
reviews.test: Historical truth and superseded-state exposure; no fabricated as-of timestamp.

reviews.scope_review: The fact-shaped query-boundary statement is in ai-pos.
reviews.expected_review: rec-011 is the matching accepted fact; later equivalent facts are alternatives.
reviews.test: Type-filtered fact retrieval distinct from Q01's decision.

reviews.scope_review: The application-owned README link is in ai-pos-app.
reviews.expected_review: rec-012 is a valid accepted artifact link; equivalent valid links are alternatives.
reviews.test: Artifact URI lookup in the application scope.

reviews.scope_review: The Compose decision belongs to smart-timesheet.
reviews.expected_review: rec-013 is the accepted decision and rec-033 is equivalent.
reviews.test: Decision-level mini-core retrieval.

reviews.scope_review: The source-structure outcome belongs to abap-object-exporter.
reviews.expected_review: rec-014 is accepted; rec-034 is an equivalent outcome.
reviews.test: Outcome retrieval distinct from the policy in Q09.

reviews.scope_review: The fact formulation of the Graphiti conclusion belongs to personal.
reviews.expected_review: rec-015 is accepted; rec-035 is equivalent, while rec-045 is superseded.
reviews.test: Concept retrieval with current-state filtering.

reviews.scope_review: The deterministic touches relation is owned by ai-pos.
reviews.expected_review: rec-016 is a valid accepted artifact link; rec-036 is equivalent.
reviews.test: Relation and artifact-path retrieval.

reviews.scope_review: The isolation decision is owned by ai-pos-app.
reviews.expected_review: rec-017 is accepted and rec-037 is equivalent.
reviews.test: Decision retrieval for workspace isolation.

reviews.scope_review: The SQLite WAL outcome belongs to smart-timesheet.
reviews.expected_review: rec-018 is accepted and rec-038 is equivalent.
reviews.test: German query against English outcome text.

reviews.scope_review: The artifact-path fact belongs to abap-object-exporter.
reviews.expected_review: rec-019 is accepted and rec-039 is equivalent.
reviews.test: Fact retrieval for the ABAP artifact restriction.

reviews.scope_review: The link is owned by personal even though its URI names ai-pos; record ownership defines scope.
reviews.expected_review: rec-020 is the valid personal artifact link and rec-040 is equivalent.
reviews.test: Artifact provenance without accidental scope expansion.

reviews.scope_review: The question explicitly asks for one ai-pos decision and one ai-pos-app artifact link, so both scopes are necessary.
reviews.expected_review: rec-021 supplies the decision and rec-012 supplies the application link; declared alternatives are equivalent records only in the two authorized workspaces.
reviews.test: Deliberate fan-out retrieval and rejection of every third-workspace result.

reviews.scope_review: The local-model decision is explicitly scoped to sensitive sap-work.
reviews.expected_review: rec-053 is the accepted sensitive decision; no normal-scope alternative is valid.
reviews.test: Explicit sensitive scope and sensitive_allowed policy.

reviews.scope_review: The German mini-core fact belongs to smart-timesheet.
reviews.expected_review: rec-023 is accepted; rec-003 and rec-043 are equivalent facts in the same scope.
reviews.test: Second multilingual fact retrieval.

reviews.scope_review: The artifact-link record is owned by abap-object-exporter.
reviews.expected_review: rec-024 is valid; rec-004 and rec-044 are equivalent valid ABAP links.
reviews.test: Exact README artifact lookup with validity enforcement.
